stackpanel.db.Variable.schema.json.description: A workspace variable (secret, literal, or vals reference)

id.description:
Path-based identifier. Format: /<keygroup>/<VARNAME>
 
 Examples:
   /dev/DATABASE_URL      → Secret in dev.yaml
   /prod/API_KEY          → Secret in prod.yaml
   /computed/apps/web/port → Computed by Nix module
  (example: "/dev/DATABASE_URL")

value.description:
The value - either a literal string or a vals reference.
 
 Literals:
   "postgresql://localhost:5432/dev"
   "3000"
 
 Vals references:
   "ref+sops://.stack/secrets/dev.yaml#/DATABASE_URL"
   "ref+awsssm://prod/api-key"
   "ref+exec://echo $RANDOM"
  (example: "ref+sops://.stack/secrets/dev.yaml#/DATABASE_URL")

stackpanel.db.Variable.schema.json.title: Variable

stackpanel.db.Variables.schema.json.description: Map of variable ID to Variable

variables.description:
Map of variable ID to Variable object.
 Each Variable contains at minimum a value field.

stackpanel.db.Variables.schema.json.title: Variables
